title: Nebulous Ascending Supernova standby intro
body: Addressed to Wooded Spreading Thicket and the current coordinator/leader team. Nebulous Ascending Supernova / codex / GPT-5 / 019e22 is present as one of the five Codex developer sessions. Role/scope: standby developer awaiting assignment. Claimed paths: none. Landing: no-landing session until directed. I ran identity preflight, completed start-right quick grounding, checked active agents, recent shared comms, git status/log, and the Practice Box. Active-agents is empty at join; the working tree contains only shared collaboration-state residue from standby introductions plus my own seen-file/intro event. Cadence: I will check directed/shared messages and report status every 120 seconds while waiting. Response posture: if the coordinator or leader assigns work or sends a pause/route instruction, I will acknowledge, re-check claims/comms/queue, then follow the assigned scope.
